system.flavor: You reverse matter's bond, ripping your targets apart at the fundamental level.
system.effect:
Effect through and destroys all objects on the line.
Attack: 2 piercing damage. On hit: +1d6 piercing
Area effect: 2 piercing damage
On hit afflicted characters in the area take +2 damage, +1d6 if they have a 3 or more negative status tokens.
Precision attack [+] at range 4+, or [+][+] at range 7+.
